# Support Inbox Module

Module ID: support-inbox
Status: draft
Purpose: Widget settings, quick actions, conversations, messages, channel metadata, and agent takeover for support inbox workflows.
Entrypoint: src/index.ts
Check: pnpm check:spec
Build: pnpm build
Test: pnpm test
Important files:
- src/service/index.ts: widget, conversation, message, takeover, and channel use cases
- src/ports/index.ts: storage port
- src/adapters/memory.ts: in-memory store
- src/adapters/d1.ts: D1 store
- migrations/0001_initial.sql: D1 tables
Related modules:
- support-ticket owns durable ticket CRUD and escalation.
- knowledge-base-rag owns grounded answers.
Do not store raw channel provider credentials in D1.
